raw:
<SCENE_ANALYSIS - A yellow knife, a green cloth, a metal bowl with a black and white object inside, and a blue plate are on a wooden table. STRATEGY - reach the yellow knife, grasp it, transport it to the blue plate, and place it on the blue plate. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the yellow knife at its handle for a secure grip. Step 2 grasp the yellow knife's handle. Step 3 transport the yellow knife to the blue plate. Step 4 place the yellow knife on the blue plate.
<SCENE: yellow_knife, green_cloth, metal_bowl, blue_plate, table>
<STEP 1: reach(yellow_knife)>
  affordance_region: the yellow plastic handle of the knife
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_knife, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_knife) < 0.03
<STEP 2: grasp(yellow_knife)>
  affordance_region: the handle of the yellow knife
  contact: holding(yellow_knife) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_knife)
<STEP 3: transport(yellow_knife -> blue_plate)>
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue plate
  spatial: above(yellow_knife, blue_plate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_knife)
  done_when: above(yellow_knife, blue_plate, 0.05)
<STEP 4: place(yellow_knife -> blue_plate)>
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue plate
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_knife, blue_plate) [completion]; released(yellow_knife) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_knife) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_knife, blue_plate) AND released(yellow_knife)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the yellow plastic handle of the knife
